name: The Back Room Where It Happens
text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, convene a meeting in the back room. Each opponent must either give you a snack, a Treasure, or do you a Favor (you create a Favor token). They choose, then you draw a card.
No minutes are kept. No minutes have ever been kept. The room does not officially exist.
flavorText: The deals are struck here, behind the unmarked door, beneath the flickering bulb, over the table that wobbles.
